definition: On the subject of something.
example: We read a book about animals.

definition: Coming later in time or order.
example: We play outside after school.

definition: One more time.
example: Please say that again.

definition: In addition; too.
example: I like cats and also dogs.

definition: At all times, every time.
example: She always brushes her teeth before bed.

definition: A living creature that can move and breathe.
example: A dog is my favorite animal.

definition: Earlier than something else.
example: Wash your hands before eating.

definition: In the space separating two things.
example: The cat sat between the two boxes.

definition: To carry something to a place.
example: Please bring your book to class.

definition: To hold and move something from one place to another.
example: Can you carry this bag for me?

definition: Free from dirt; to make something tidy.
example: We clean our room every Saturday.

definition: Near to something; to shut.
example: Please close the door when you leave.

definition: Having a low temperature; not warm.
example: The ice cream is very cold.

definition: A quality like red, blue, or green that you can see.
example: My favorite color is blue.

definition: Was able to; used to ask for something politely.
example: Could you help me with this, please?

definition: A land with its own government and people.
example: Japan is a country in Asia.

definition: A movable panel used to open or close an entrance.
example: He knocked on the door before entering.

definition: To make a picture using a pencil or pen.
example: I love to draw pictures of horses.

definition: To swallow a liquid.
example: Remember to drink water every day.

definition: Throughout the time of something.
example: We must be quiet during the movie.

definition: Every one of a group considered separately.
example: Each student got a new pencil.

definition: The planet we live on; also the soil on the ground.
example: We should take care of the earth.

definition: All the people or things in a group.
example: Every child in the class raised a hand.

definition: Something that shows what other things are like.
example: A cat is an example of a pet.

definition: A group of people related to each other.
example: My family eats dinner together every night.

definition: Moving or happening quickly.
example: The cheetah is the fastest animal.

definition: A male parent.
example: My father reads me a story at bedtime.

definition: To go behind or come after someone.
example: Follow me and I will show you the way.

definition: Discovered or came across something.
example: I found a coin on the sidewalk.

definition: A person you like and enjoy spending time with.
example: My best friend lives next door.

definition: To hand something to another person.
example: I will give you a piece of my apple.

definition: Moving toward a place or goal.
example: We are going to the park today.

definition: Very large or very good.
example: You did a great job on your test!

definition: A number of people or things together.
example: A group of students worked on the project.

definition: To get bigger over time.
example: Plants grow when you water them.

definition: The part of your body at the end of your arm.
example: She raised her hand to answer the question.

definition: Not easy; also firm and solid.
example: Math can be hard, but practice helps.

definition: To make it easier for someone to do something.
example: Can you help me find my pencil?

definition: Far up from the ground.
example: The bird flew high in the sky.

definition: The place where you live.
example: We go home after school each day.

definition: A building where people live.
example: Their house has a red front door.

definition: To have and not give away; to continue doing.
example: You can keep the extra pencil.

definition: Friendly and caring toward others.
example: It is kind to share with your friends.

definition: Big in size.
example: An elephant is a very large animal.

definition: Coming at the end; the one before no others.
example: I was the last one to finish lunch.

definition: To gain new knowledge or a skill.
example: We learn new words every day at school.

definition: To go away from a place.
example: We leave for school at 8 o'clock.

definition: The brightness that lets you see; not heavy.
example: Turn on the light so we can see.

definition: A long thin mark; also a row of people.
example: Please stand in a straight line.

definition: To be alive; to make your home somewhere.
example: Fish live in the water.

definition: A strong feeling of caring for someone.
example: I love my family very much.

definition: Created or built something.
example: She made a card for her mom.

definition: A large number of things or people.
example: There are many stars in the sky.

definition: To have a certain meaning; not kind.
example: What does that word mean?

definition: The part of you that thinks and feels.
example: Keep an open mind when trying new things.

definition: A greater amount or number.
example: Can I have more juice, please?

definition: The greatest amount or number.
example: She read the most books in the class.

definition: A female parent.
example: My mother makes the best soup.

definition: A large amount of something.
example: Thank you very much for your help.

definition: Have to; it is necessary.
example: You must wear a helmet when riding a bike.

definition: To require something that is important.
example: Plants need sunlight to grow.

definition: At no time; not ever.
example: I have never been to the ocean.

definition: Coming immediately after the present one.
example: I am next in line.

definition: The dark time after the sun goes down.
example: Stars come out at night.

definition: Not anything; no thing.
example: There is nothing left in the box.

definition: Not closed; to make something not closed.
example: Please open the window for fresh air.

definition: A living thing that grows in soil and needs water.
example: We planted a seed and watched it grow into a plant.

definition: To aim your finger at something; a sharp tip.
example: He used a pencil to point to the map.

definition: To look at words and understand them.
example: I read a new book last night.

definition: Correct; also the direction opposite to left.
example: Turn right at the next corner.

definition: To appear to be a certain way.
example: You seem happy today!

definition: To let someone see something.
example: Show me your drawing when you are done.

definition: Little in size.
example: A kitten is a small cat.

definition: To begin doing something.
example: Let's start reading the story.

definition: Not moving; continuing to be the same.
example: Please sit still while I take your photo.

definition: A description of events, real or made up.
example: Grandma told us a funny story.

definition: To say words to someone.
example: We talk to our friends at recess.

definition: The ones over there; referring to specific things.
example: Those shoes are too big for me.

definition: Going from one side to the other.
example: The ball rolled through the tunnel.

definition: With each other; at the same time.
example: We worked together to clean the room.

definition: To move in a different direction; a person's chance.
example: It is your turn to roll the dice.

definition: Below something else.
example: The cat hid under the table.

definition: Up to a certain time.
example: Wait here until I come back.

definition: Happening most of the time; normally.
example: I usually wake up at seven in the morning.

definition: To move by putting one foot in front of the other.
example: We walk to school every day.

definition: The clear liquid you drink and that fills oceans.
example: Drink plenty of water to stay healthy.

definition: During the time that something else is happening.
example: She read a book while waiting for the bus.

definition: The color of snow or milk.
example: The rabbit had soft white fur.

definition: Complete; all of something.
example: I ate the whole apple.

definition: Not old; in the early part of life.
example: A puppy is a young dog.
